summary: Issue #403 Phase 2.6 cancellation/return/refund Decision workflows: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Workflows 7–9 five-stage review + mock execution timelines; FBT prevent_return_8b_fbt scaffold-only; shared card Approve/Reject contract; 6/6 ACs mapped; demo + contracts targeted tests green. No CRITICAL reliability/security findings on mock-only Demo surface.

interfaceChanges.description: Generalized terminal succeeded outcome detection beyond Workflow-1 listed-outcome only.

mappings.criterion: Workflows 7–9 each complete their documented prefilled/fillable review flow
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/workflows-7-9-review-execution.test.tsx::completes prevent_cancellation_8a review and creates the correct mock execution

mappings.criterion: Final approval creates the correct mock execution key and lifecycle detail
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/workflows-7-9-review-execution.test.tsx::completes prevent_return_8b review and creates the correct mock execution

mappings.criterion: Prevent-return FBT behavior remains intake/scaffold-only and is not presented as executable
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/workflows-7-9-review-execution.test.tsx::keeps prevent-return FBT intake scaffold-only and not executable

mappings.criterion: Evidence, waits, outcomes, recovery, and rollback states match each workflow specification
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/lib/__tests__/executions.test.ts::maps cancellation, return, and refund evidence/wait/outcome/recovery states

mappings.criterion: Reject/Expand/Manual Refresh behavior remains consistent with the shared card contract
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/workflows-7-9-review-execution.test.tsx::enables Approve for workflows 7–9 while keeping Reject on the shared card contract

mappings.criterion: One integration test per workflow covers review → approve → In Progress public behavior
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/workflows-7-9-review-execution.test.tsx::one integration test per workflow covers review approve In Progress public behavior

recommendations: Optional later: extract shared review→approve harness from workflows-7-9 integration test.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; 6/6 ACs mapped; targeted demo + contracts tests green. Approve merge for #403.

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged review PASS; workflows 7–9 mock Decision lifecycle verified.
